<h1 id="heading-1"><strong class="my-custom-class">试用Kong的管理后台Konga</strong></h1><img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="" title=""><h2 id="heading-2"><strong class="my-custom-class">简介</strong></h2><p>Konga 是 Kong 的一个开源的管理后台。</p><p>官方网站：<a href="https://github.com/pantsel/konga">https://github.com/pantsel/konga</a></p><h2 id="heading-3"><strong class="my-custom-class">安装</strong></h2><h3 id="heading-4"><strong class="my-custom-class">环境要求</strong></h3><p>确保已安装 npm 、node.js、bower。</p><h3 id="heading-5"><strong class="my-custom-class">下载 Konga 源码</strong></h3><pre height="0" database="{&quot;items&quot;:[{&quot;title&quot;:&quot;代码块&quot;,&quot;content&quot;:&quot;git clone https://github.com/pantsel/konga.git&quot;,&quot;language&quot;:&quot;Unknown&quot;}],&quot;activatedIndex&quot;:0}" uuid="3a963197-734b-4ce1-9b6c-08d2e8b80ef9"></pre><h3 id="heading-6"><strong class="my-custom-class">安装依赖</strong></h3><pre height="0" database="{&quot;items&quot;:[{&quot;title&quot;:&quot;代码块&quot;,&quot;content&quot;:&quot;npm run postinstall &amp;&amp; npm i&quot;,&quot;language&quot;:&quot;Unknown&quot;}],&quot;activatedIndex&quot;:0}" uuid="20fe838b-9735-4554-ba96-5462cce63f44"></pre><h3 id="heading-7"><strong class="my-custom-class">生成配置文件</strong></h3><pre height="0" database="{&quot;items&quot;:[{&quot;title&quot;:&quot;代码块&quot;,&quot;content&quot;:&quot;cp .env.example .env&quot;,&quot;language&quot;:&quot;Unknown&quot;}],&quot;activatedIndex&quot;:0}" uuid="1d5cce5c-dd0d-4ef0-a7f1-9d294d545699"></pre><h3 id="heading-8"><strong class="my-custom-class">参考配置文件</strong></h3><p>.env 文件内容参考：</p><pre height="0" database="{&quot;items&quot;:[{&quot;title&quot;:&quot;代码块&quot;,&quot;content&quot;:&quot;PORT=1337\nNODE_ENV=production\nKONGA_HOOK_TIMEOUT=120000\nDB_ADAPTER=mysql\nDB_HOST=127.0.0.1\nDB_PORT=3306\nDB_USER=konga\nDB_DATABASE=konga\nDB_PASSWORD=konga\nKONGA_LOG_LEVEL=warn\nTOKEN_SECRET=some_secret_token\n&quot;,&quot;language&quot;:&quot;Text&quot;}],&quot;activatedIndex&quot;:0}" uuid="ca11e4cf-705e-4f96-828c-19a6ddbd19a7"></pre><p>以上配置文件使用了本机的 MySQL 数据库。</p><h3 id="heading-9"><strong class="my-custom-class">执行数据库迁移</strong></h3><pre height="0" database="{&quot;items&quot;:[{&quot;title&quot;:&quot;代码块&quot;,&quot;content&quot;:&quot;node ./bin/konga.js  prepare --adapter mysql --uri mysql://localhost:5432/konga&quot;,&quot;language&quot;:&quot;Unknown&quot;}],&quot;activatedIndex&quot;:0}" uuid="a63bab60-edfd-4bc3-a437-98a132034178"></pre><p>数据库中会生成 Konga 的相关表：</p><img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="" title=""><h2 id="heading-10"><strong class="my-custom-class">启动 Konga</strong></h2><pre height="0" database="{&quot;items&quot;:[{&quot;title&quot;:&quot;代码块&quot;,&quot;content&quot;:&quot;npm run production&quot;,&quot;language&quot;:&quot;Unknown&quot;}],&quot;activatedIndex&quot;:0}" uuid="da321f9c-944a-4827-9790-f9a11ea965c8"></pre><p>输出：</p><pre height="0" database="{&quot;items&quot;:[{&quot;title&quot;:&quot;代码块&quot;,&quot;content&quot;:&quot;> kongadmin@0.14.9 production /www/wwwroot/konga\n> node --harmony app.js --prod\n\n(node:4108059) Warning: Accessing non-existent property 'padLevels' of module exports inside circular dependency\n(Use `node --trace-warnings ...` to show where the warning was created)\n(node:4108059) [DEP0095] DeprecationWarning: timers.enroll() is deprecated. Please use setTimeout instead.\n(node:4108059) [DEP0126] DeprecationWarning: timers.active() is deprecated. Please use timeout.refresh() instead.\n(node:4108059) [DEP0096] DeprecationWarning: timers.unenroll() is deprecated. Please use clearTimeout instead.\n&quot;,&quot;language&quot;:&quot;Unknown&quot;}],&quot;activatedIndex&quot;:0}" uuid="02500fff-41f0-423f-ba06-54de7d77602a"></pre><h2 id="heading-11"><strong class="my-custom-class">保持 Konga 在后台运行</strong></h2><p>在生产环境中，执行：</p><pre height="0" database="{&quot;items&quot;:[{&quot;title&quot;:&quot;代码块&quot;,&quot;content&quot;:&quot;pm2 start app.js --name konga&quot;,&quot;language&quot;:&quot;Unknown&quot;}],&quot;activatedIndex&quot;:0}" uuid="c1562fa4-ebdb-45b0-95a9-a9bd0323119c"></pre><p>输出：</p><pre height="0" database="{&quot;items&quot;:[{&quot;title&quot;:&quot;代码块&quot;,&quot;content&quot;:&quot;│ id  │ name   │ namespace   │ version │ mode    │ pid      │ uptime │ ↺    │ status    │ cpu      │ mem      │ user     │ watching │\n├─────┼────────┼─────────────┼─────────┼─────────┼──────────┼────────┼──────┼───────────┼──────────┼──────────┼──────────┼──────────┤\n│ 1   │ app    │ default     │ 0.14.9  │ fork    │ 4126729  │ 76s    │ 0    │ online    │ 0%       │ 94.1mb   │ www      │ disabled │\n└─────┴────────┴─────────────┴─────────┴─────────┴──────────┴────────┴──────┴───────────┴──────────┴──────────┴──────────┴──────────┘&quot;,&quot;language&quot;:&quot;Text&quot;}],&quot;activatedIndex&quot;:0}" uuid="6ffc3187-1c63-4291-bf66-d1c332a59130"></pre><p></p><toc></toc>
